message:
refactor(demo): Clippy cleanup and pattern improvements

app.rs:
- Use write! macro instead of format!+push_str (avoids intermediate alloc)
- Add #[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] on App struct
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines, ...)] on update() method
- Fix doc comments: escape backticks around max_width and BlurMsg

guided_tour.rs:
- Combine match arms: ['n'] | [' '] → ['n' | ' ']
  (more idiomatic pattern matching)

theme.rs:
- Rename unused variable: name → _name (silence warning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
